description: Vimeo is a video hosting and management platform for uploading, organizing, streaming, and analyzing videos. It also offers developer tooling for integrating video workflows and account data into custom applications.
summary: Vimeo exposes a REST API at https://api.vimeo.com and a remote MCP server at https://mcp.vimeo.com/mcp; both are documented on developer.vimeo.com, and the REST API uses Vimeo-issued OAuth app credentials/access tokens.
